title: Phase 1 Foundation Layer (Tier 1 - High Density) — Buddhist Consciousness Architecture

concepts.title: Buddhist Consciousness Architecture: Five Skandhas + 18 Ayatanas + Mano-Dhatu vs Mano-Vijnana
concepts.description: The complete structure of how consciousness assembles and perpetuates itself moment by moment through five bundled patterns and eighteen sensory-mental gateways

concepts.title: Elemental Consciousness Principles: Five Elements as Consciousness Operators
concepts.description: Earth, Water, Fire, Air, Space as five distinct operating modes of consciousness, not material substances; maps to Five Skandhas and Five Klesa

concepts.title: Mandala Architecture: The Four Forms as Consciousness Blueprints
concepts.description: The Maha, Samaya, Karma, and Dharma mandalas as four levels of encoding consciousness-structure into visual-sonic-kinetic forms

concepts.title: Vajramukti as Buddhist Martial Philosophy: Fighting as Consciousness-Work
concepts.description: Buddhist martial art as accelerated consciousness-transformation through direct physical confrontation

concepts.title: Prasada: Buddhist Consciousness-Based Energy, Distinct from Prana and Chi
concepts.description: Energy that arises only where consciousness is clear; fundamental distinction from Hindu prana and Taoist chi
